{{Infobox character
| name = Makko
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Makko]] is a guardian of the courtyard.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Makko]] is a guardian in [[Valinhall]] that appears as a multi-colored yarn wolf.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Makko]]'s eyes are smooth black pebbles.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Makko]]'s teeth look like knitting needles made of smooth bone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
